title: GeckOverride
description: A dependancy that allows MCreator mods in 1.18.2 to set things as mineable via a separate tag to work around the bug present in old version of Nerdy's GeckoLib Plugin that removes modded items from the main tag.
body: So there's this super annoying bug in the otherwise awesome Nerdy's Geckolib Plugin where if you create an animated block and you're running an older version of MCreator/Minecraft, it makes it so that blocks from your mod no longer mine faster with tools. So I made this mod as a workaround; just tag all the blocks mined by pickaxe as "forge:kv_pickaxe mineable" and the ones with an axe as "forge:kv_axe_mineable".
